title: Polymarket is being blocked in France.
summary: Everything is gambling now: the latest news on prediction markets like Polymarket and Kalshi The country’s gambling regulator ordered local internet service ​providers to block access to the Polymarket website on Friday, citing noncompliance concerns with rules for gambling and gaming services.
